title: allium carinatum subsp. asperum
intro: Allium carinatum subsp. asperum, also known as sharp-leaved flame or lesser onion, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the genus Allium. It has been used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Allium carinatum subsp. asperum include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Allium carinatum subsp. asperum include infusions, tinctures, and topical ointments, which can be used to treat conditions such as wounds, colds, and skin irritations.
